name: apply_theme
description: Apply a lighting theme preset. Each theme configures all lights with specific colors and brightness. Available themes: christmas, halloween, starry, bonfire, aurora, sunset.

theme_id.description: Theme ID: christmas, halloween, starry, bonfire, aurora, sunset

name: create_scene
description: Dynamically create a lighting scene from a natural language description. The system will generate appropriate colors and brightness for all devices based on the mood/atmosphere described. Example: 'romantic dinner', 'focus work mode', 'movie night'.

description.description: Natural language description of the desired atmosphere or scene
